themes.headline: Closed at ₹8.7T AUM, market share 11.5% (12.8% ex-ETF)
themes.detail: Actively managed equity AUM ₹5.4T, market share 12.9%.

themes.headline: Net addition of 6 million contributing SIP accounts in the quarter
themes.detail: SIP contribution at ₹294 bn for September 2025. Management notes 'growing maturity and long-term orientation of Indian investors'.

themes.headline: Gold ETF AUM 38% jump; silver ETF AUM more than doubled in-quarter
themes.detail: Gold ETF AUM moved ₹102bn → ₹141bn; silver ETF AUM ₹9bn → ₹24bn.

themes.headline: Equity-oriented NFOs collected ₹141 bn during the quarter
themes.detail: Industry equity-oriented funds saw net flows of ₹1,490 bn (vs ₹911 bn prior quarter when NIFTY was +8.5%).

themes.headline: NIFTY 50 delivered negative returns in trailing 12 months
themes.detail: Despite this, equity-oriented funds saw ₹5.1 trillion of net inflows over the same 12 months — a contrarian signal.

events.label: Equity-oriented NFOs collected ₹141 bn during the quarter

quotes.text: The net addition of 6 million contributing SIP accounts in the quarter reflects the growing maturity and long-term orientation of Indian investors.
quotes.speaker: Simal Kanuga, CIRO
